## Integrated Power of Three Systems into One Data-Backed Platform

![]()

Application Management

### Applicant Management

Manage applicants, create and customise workflows with ease and flexibility.

![]()

Online Assessments

### Online Assessments

Measure applicants with holistic psychometric, cognitive & competency based grading.

![]()

Structured Online Interviews

### Structured Online Interviews

Move interviews online with collaborative tools, structured grading & keep digital records.

* * *

## Our Smart Hiring Philosophy Rests On Two Core Principles

![]()

Hero-Image 1

![]()

Hero-Image 1

### Optimize the Entire Recruitment Life Cycle Using Our Intelligent Hiring Software to Save Time and Cost

![]()

ImgLeft

Translate your recruitment process onto the platform with ease. Create specific job-roles, define competency framework & upload applicant's information.

Filter out applicants using secure assessments that can be scheduled as per your convenience.

Use digital hiring solutions to select the best from the pool of applicants. Create a panel of interviewers, define grading framework & schedule interviews easily.

Decide an applicant's final status after looking at debriefs from hiring managers and applicant's overall score.

* * *

## More Reasons to Love HireTRACK

Feel The Difference

Single Integrated System

### Single Integrated System

Manage everything from assessments, interview to tracking applicants, all-in-one system.
